net.milkbowl.vault2.chat

Interface ChatUnlocked


  • public interface ChatUnlocked
    Represents a chat provider that allows customization and management of prefixes, suffixes, and related information for both individual subjects and groups within a specified context. This interface provides methods to retrieve and modify these properties, as well as to check for feature support for group-based metadata.
    Since:
    2.18
    Author:
    creatorfromhell

      Asynchronously copies the prefix from one subject to another within the given context.
      boolean copySuffix(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject from, @NotNull Subject to)
      Copies the suffix from one subject to another within the given context.
      CompletableFuture<Boolean> copySuffixAsync(@NotNull Context context, @NotNull Subject from, @NotNull Subject to)
      Asynchronously copies the suffix from one subject to another in the provided context.

      Asynchronously retrieves the prefix associated with the given subject in the specified context.

      Retrieves the prefix for the specified subject within the provided context, or null if no prefix exists.

      Retrieves the suffix for the specified subject within the given context.

      Asynchronously retrieves the suffix associated with the provided subject within the given context.

      Retrieves the suffix for the specified subject in the provided context, or returns null if not available.
      boolean hasGroupSupport()
      Checks whether the chat provider supports group-based prefixes, suffixes, and info nodes.
      boolean isEnabled()
      Checks whether this chat provider is enabled.

      Asynchronously sets a value in the specified context for the given subject and key.

      Sets the prefix for the specified subject within the given context.

    • Method Detail

      • isEnabled

        boolean isEnabled()
        Checks whether this chat provider is enabled.
        Returns:
        true if the chat provider is enabled; false otherwise.
        Since:
        2.18

      • getName

        @NotNull
@NotNull String getName()
        Retrieves the name of this chat provider.
        Returns:
        the name of the chat provider as a non-null string.
        Since:
        2.18

      • hasGroupSupport

        boolean hasGroupSupport()
        Checks whether the chat provider supports group-based prefixes, suffixes, and info nodes.
        Returns:
        true if group-based prefixes, suffixes and info nodes are supported; false otherwise.
        Since:
        2.18

      • getPrefix

        Optional<String> getPrefix(@NotNull
                           @NotNull Context context,
                           @NotNull
                           @NotNull Subject subject)
        Retrieves the prefix for the specified subject within the given context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the prefix is being retrieved; must not be null
        subject - the subject whose prefix is to be retrieved; must not be null
        Returns:
        an optional containing the prefix if it exists, or an empty optional if no prefix is set
        Since:
        2.18

      • getPrefixAsync

        CompletableFuture<Optional<String>> getPrefixAsync(@NotNull
                                                   @NotNull Context context,
                                                   @NotNull
                                                   @NotNull Subject subject)
        Asynchronously retrieves the prefix associated with the given subject in the specified context. The computation is executed asynchronously and returns a CompletableFuture containing an Optional with the prefix, or an empty Optional if no prefix is set.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the prefix is being retrieved; must not be null
        subject - the subject whose prefix is to be retrieved; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture containing an Optional with the prefix if it exists, or an empty Optional if no prefix is set
        Since:
        2.18

      • getPrefixOrNull

        default String getPrefixOrNull(@NotNull
                               @NotNull Context context,
                               @NotNull
                               @NotNull Subject subject)
        Retrieves the prefix for the specified subject within the provided context, or null if no prefix exists.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the prefix is being retrieved; must not be null
        subject - the subject whose prefix is to be retrieved; must not be null
        Returns:
        the prefix as a string if it exists, or null if no prefix is set
        Since:
        2.18

      • getSuffix

        Optional<String> getSuffix(@NotNull
                           @NotNull Context context,
                           @NotNull
                           @NotNull Subject subject)
        Retrieves the suffix for the specified subject within the given context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the suffix is being retrieved; must not be null
        subject - the subject whose suffix is to be retrieved; must not be null
        Returns:
        an optional containing the suffix if it exists, or an empty optional if no suffix is set
        Since:
        2.18

      • getSuffixAsync

        CompletableFuture<Optional<String>> getSuffixAsync(@NotNull
                                                   @NotNull Context context,
                                                   @NotNull
                                                   @NotNull Subject subject)
        Asynchronously retrieves the suffix associated with the provided subject within the given context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which to look up the suffix; must not be null
        subject - the subject for which the suffix is to be retrieved; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to an Optional containing the suffix, or an empty Optional if no suffix is found
        Since:
        2.18

      • getSuffixOrNull

        default String getSuffixOrNull(@NotNull
                               @NotNull Context context,
                               @NotNull
                               @NotNull Subject subject)
        Retrieves the suffix for the specified subject in the provided context, or returns null if not available.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the suffix is being retrieved, must not be null
        subject - the subject for which the suffix is being retrieved, must not be null
        Returns:
        the suffix as a string if available, or null if no suffix is present
        Since:
        2.18

      • setPrefix

        boolean setPrefix(@NotNull
                  @NotNull Context context,
                  @NotNull
                  @NotNull Subject subject,
                  @NotNull
                  @NotNull String prefix)
        Sets the prefix for the specified subject within the given context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the prefix is being set; must not be null
        subject - the subject for which the prefix is being updated; must not be null
        prefix - the new prefix to be assigned; must not be null
        Returns:
        true if the prefix was successfully set, false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • setPrefixAsync

        CompletableFuture<Boolean> setPrefixAsync(@NotNull
                                          @NotNull Context context,
                                          @NotNull
                                          @NotNull Subject subject,
                                          @NotNull
                                          @NotNull String prefix)
        Asynchronously sets a prefix for a given subject within a specified context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the prefix is being set, must not be null
        subject - the subject for which the prefix is being set, must not be null
        prefix - the prefix value to be set, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to a Boolean indicating whether the operation was successful
        Since:
        2.18

      • copyPrefix

        boolean copyPrefix(@NotNull
                   @NotNull Context context,
                   @NotNull
                   @NotNull Subject from,
                   @NotNull
                   @NotNull Subject to)
        Copies the prefix from one subject to another within a given context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the operation is performed, must not be null
        from - the subject from which the prefix will be copied, must not be null
        to - the subject to which the prefix will be applied, must not be null
        Returns:
        true if the prefix was successfully copied, false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • copyPrefixAsync

        CompletableFuture<Boolean> copyPrefixAsync(@NotNull
                                           @NotNull Context context,
                                           @NotNull
                                           @NotNull Subject from,
                                           @NotNull
                                           @NotNull Subject to)
        Asynchronously copies the prefix from one subject to another within the given context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the operation is performed; must not be null
        from - the subject from which the prefix will be copied; must not be null
        to - the subject to which the prefix will be copied; must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that completes with true if the prefix was successfully copied, or false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • setSuffix

        boolean setSuffix(@NotNull
                  @NotNull Context context,
                  @NotNull
                  @NotNull Subject subject,
                  @NotNull
                  @NotNull String suffix)
        Sets the suffix for the specified subject within the given context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the suffix is being set; must not be null
        subject - the subject for which the suffix is being updated; must not be null
        suffix - the new suffix to be assigned; must not be null
        Returns:
        true if the suffix was successfully set, false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • setSuffixAsync

        CompletableFuture<Boolean> setSuffixAsync(@NotNull
                                          @NotNull Context context,
                                          @NotNull
                                          @NotNull Subject subject,
                                          @NotNull
                                          @NotNull String suffix)
        Asynchronously sets a suffix for the given subject within the specified context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the suffix should be applied, must not be null
        subject - the subject to which the suffix will be assigned, must not be null
        suffix - the suffix to assign to the subject, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to a Boolean indicating whether the operation was successful
        Since:
        2.18

      • copySuffix

        boolean copySuffix(@NotNull
                   @NotNull Context context,
                   @NotNull
                   @NotNull Subject from,
                   @NotNull
                   @NotNull Subject to)
        Copies the suffix from one subject to another within the given context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the operation is performed, must not be null
        from - the subject from which the suffix will be copied, must not be null
        to - the subject to which the suffix will be added, must not be null
        Returns:
        true if the suffix was successfully copied, false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • copySuffixAsync

        CompletableFuture<Boolean> copySuffixAsync(@NotNull
                                           @NotNull Context context,
                                           @NotNull
                                           @NotNull Subject from,
                                           @NotNull
                                           @NotNull Subject to)
        Asynchronously copies the suffix from one subject to another in the provided context.
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the suffix copy operation is performed, must not be null
        from - the source subject from which the suffix is copied, must not be null
        to - the target subject to which the suffix is copied, must not be null
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that completes with true if the suffix was successfully copied, or false if the operation failed
        Since:
        2.18

      • get

        <T> Optional<T> get(Context context,
                    Subject subject,
                    InfoKey<T> key)
        Retrieves the value associated with the specified key for the given subject within the provided context.
        Type Parameters:
        T - the type of the value to be retrieved
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the value is being retrieved; must not be null
        subject - the subject for which the value is being retrieved; must not be null
        key - the key identifying the value to be retrieved; must not be null
        Returns:
        an Optional containing the value associated with the provided key if it exists; otherwise, an empty Optional
        Since:
        2.18

      • getAsync

        <T> CompletableFuture<Optional<T>> getAsync(Context context,
                                            Subject subject,
                                            InfoKey<T> key)
        Retrieves an asynchronous result wrapped in a CompletableFuture. The result contains an Optional object that may hold the value corresponding to the specified InfoKey.
        Type Parameters:
        T - The type of the value associated with the given InfoKey.
        Parameters:
        context - The context in which the asynchronous operation is executed.
        subject - The subject associated with the requested operation.
        key - The key that identifies the specific data to be retrieved.
        Returns:
        A CompletableFuture that completes with an Optional containing the result, or an empty Optional if the value is not present.
        Since:
        2.18

      • getOrDefault

        default <T> T getOrDefault(Context context,
                           Subject subject,
                           InfoKey<T> key,
                           T defaultValue)
        Retrieves the value associated with the specified key for the given subject within the provided context. If no value is found, the provided default value is returned.
        Type Parameters:
        T - the type of the value to be retrieved
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the value is being retrieved; must not be null
        subject - the subject for which the value is being retrieved; must not be null
        key - the key identifying the value to be retrieved; must not be null
        defaultValue - the default value to return if no value is found; must not be null
        Returns:
        the value associated with the provided key if it exists; otherwise, the specified default value
        Since:
        2.18

      • set

        <T> boolean set(Context context,
                Subject subject,
                InfoKey<T> key,
                T value)
        Sets the value associated with a specific key for a given subject in the specified context.
        Type Parameters:
        T - the type of the value to be set
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the operation is performed; must not be null
        subject - the subject for which the value is being set; must not be null
        key - the key identifying the value to be set; must not be null
        value - the new value to associate with the given key; must not be null
        Returns:
        true if the value was successfully set, false otherwise
        Since:
        2.18

      • setAsync

        <T> CompletableFuture<Boolean> setAsync(Context context,
                                        Subject subject,
                                        InfoKey<T> key,
                                        T value)
        Asynchronously sets a value in the specified context for the given subject and key.
        Type Parameters:
        T - the type of the value
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the value should be set
        subject - the subject for which the value is being set
        key - the key associated with the value to be set
        value - the value to be set
        Returns:
        a CompletableFuture that resolves to a Boolean indicating whether the operation was successful
        Since:
        2.18
